---
title: "NBA Player Finder"
toc: false
---

Explore current NBA rosters by conference, division, team, height, age, and jersey
number. The app runs entirely in your browser (no server) via
[shinylive](https://shinylive.io/r/) and refreshes its roster data automatically
once a week. It may take a few seconds to load the first time while the R
runtime downloads.

<iframe
  src="/nba-player-finder/"
  title="NBA Player Finder"
  style="width:100%; height:85vh; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:6px;"
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>
